settings.heading: Built to be
settings.text: Training gear and apparel with nothing to prove and everything to lift. Free shipping over $75.

settings.heading: Ships in 24h
settings.text: Orders over $75 ship free. Everything leaves the rack within one working day.

settings.heading: 5-year hard-use warranty
settings.text: Drop it, rack it, chalk it. If it fails under training, we replace it.

settings.heading: Athlete-tested
settings.text: Nothing ships until it survives twelve weeks on the gym floor.

settings.heading: Coaches on support
settings.text: Sizing, programming, kit questions — answered by people who train.

settings.heading: The lookbook
settings.subheading: Worn, dropped, chalked and washed — then photographed.

settings.heading: Training wear
settings.text: Cut for full range of motion

settings.heading: Overbuilt on purpose
settings.text: Every Torque product is designed once, tested until it breaks, then rebuilt heavier. We publish the failure loads, the stitch counts and the fabric weights — because gear you trust under a bar should have nothing to hide.

settings.heading: Open gym sale — final week
settings.text: Last season's colourways at last season's prices. When it's gone, it's gone.

settings.quote: Two years of daily garage sessions and the kettlebell handle still feels factory-fresh. The chalk wears off before the finish does.
settings.author: Dana K.

settings.quote: The training shorts survived a full CrossFit open plus a season of rugby. Nothing else in my kit bag has.
settings.author: Marcus T.

settings.quote: I outfitted our whole studio with Torque bands and ropes. Eighteen months, zero replacements, zero excuses.
settings.author: Priya S.

settings.question: How does the hard-use warranty work?
settings.answer: If any Torque product fails under normal training use within five years, send us a photo and your order number — we ship a replacement. No forms, no fine print.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: You have 30 days from delivery to return any unused item for a full refund. Returns are free.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes — we ship to most countries worldwide. Duties and taxes are calculated at checkout where applicable.

settings.heading: Train on paper first
settings.text: One email a month: new drops, restocks and a training programme worth printing.
